homepage.trustedBy: Trusted by 10,000+ marketers and businesses worldwide
homepage.productsTitle: All the products you need to build brand connections
homepage.productsDesc: All the products you need to shorten links, generate QR Codes, and engage audiences everywhere.
homepage.productShortenerDesc: A comprehensive solution to help make every point of connection between your content and your audience more powerful.
homepage.productQrDesc: QR Code solutions for every customer, business and brand experience.
homepage.productPagesDesc: Create engaging, mobile-optimized landing pages in minutes.
homepage.geoTargetDesc: See exactly where your audience is located
homepage.deviceDesc: Know what devices your audience uses
homepage.processDesc: Three simple steps to get your short link ready to share across any channel.
homepage.step1Desc: Drop your long URL into the input above. It works with any link — product pages, blog posts, social content.
homepage.step2Desc: Our engine creates a clean, trackable short link in milliseconds. No waiting, no hassle.
homepage.step3Desc: Copy your link, generate a QR code, and share it across email, social, ads, and print.
homepage.plansTitle: Everything you need to master link management
homepage.plansDesc: Powerful tools designed for marketers, creators, and enterprises who take their links seriously.
homepage.feature1Desc: Track every click with detailed geographic, device, and referral data. Know exactly where your traffic comes from and what drives results.
homepage.feature2Desc: Replace generic short links with your own domain. Boost brand recognition and click-through rates with every link you share.
homepage.feature3Desc: Protect your audience with link validation, expiration dates, password protection, and automatic malicious link scanning.
homepage.feature4Desc: Invite team members, assign roles, and manage links together with shared workspaces, permissions, and detailed audit logs.
homepage.feature5Desc: Create, edit, and organize hundreds of links at once with CSV imports, smart tagging, folders, and powerful search filters.
homepage.feature6Desc: Customize slugs, set UTM parameters, schedule links, create A/B redirect rules — all from a single dashboard.
homepage.analyticsTitle: See exactly how your links perform
homepage.analyticsDesc: Get real-time insights into clicks, geographic data, referrers, and devices. Make data-driven decisions with every campaign.
homepage.testimonialsDesc: See why thousands of businesses trust RELURL for their link management.
homepage.testimonial1Quote: RELURL transformed our link strategy. We've seen a 34% increase in CTR since switching to branded short links with detailed analytics.
homepage.testimonial2Quote: The analytics alone are worth it. We finally understand which channels actually drive conversions instead of just guessing.
homepage.testimonial3Quote: We manage thousands of links across 12 campaigns. RELURL's bulk tools and team features are an absolute lifesaver for our workflow.
homepage.ctaDesc: Join thousands of businesses that trust RELURL for their link management. Start free, upgrade when you need more.

url.signInError: Please sign in to shorten URLs
url.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
url.faq1A: {title} is a free tool that transforms long, complex URLs into short, shareable links. Track clicks, customize slugs, and manage all your short links from one dashboard.
url.faq2A: Yes, our basic URL shortening service is completely free. Sign up for a free account to access custom aliases, click analytics, branded domains, and more advanced features.
url.faq3A: Simply paste your long URL into the input field above and click the shorten button. Your short link will be generated instantly. For custom slugs and tracking, create a free account.

qr.faq1A: {title} is a free online tool that creates scannable QR codes you can use for marketing, events, business cards, and more. No signup required to generate basic QR codes.
qr.faq2A: Yes, our {title} is completely free to use. Generate unlimited QR codes without any cost. Sign up for a free account to access scan analytics, custom colors, and logo integration.
qr.faq3A: Enter your URL or content in the input field above and click generate. Your QR code will be generated instantly. Download it as PNG and use it anywhere.
qr.faq4Q: How long do QR codes last?
qr.faq4A: QR codes generated on our platform never expire. Static QR codes work indefinitely. Dynamic QR codes can be edited anytime without reprinting — perfect for updating offers or links.

free-url-shortener.description: Shorten unlimited URLs for free. No account required. Get clean short links with basic analytics — completely free forever.

howItWorks.desc: Enter any long URL — no signup needed.

howItWorks.desc: Enter the long URL you want to shorten.
Pick a memorable word or phrase for your short link.
Use your custom link in emails, social media, and marketing.

features.metaDescription: Explore RELURL's powerful features: link shortening, branded domains, advanced analytics, team collaboration, and more.
features.title: Everything You Need for Link Management
features.subtitle: From simple link shortening to enterprise-grade analytics and security — we've got you covered.

linkShortening.title: Link Shortening
linkShortening.desc: Shorten any long URL into a clean, manageable link in seconds. Our engine handles millions of links daily with 99.9% uptime.
details: Bulk creation via CSV upload or API

brandedDomains.title: Branded Domains
brandedDomains.desc: Use your own domain name for all your shortened links. Build trust and brand recognition with every click.

advancedAnalytics.title: Advanced Analytics
advancedAnalytics.desc: Get deep insights into who clicks your links, when, and from where. Make data-driven decisions.
details: Export to CSV, Excel, or PDF

qrCodes.title: QR Codes
qrCodes.desc: Generate beautiful QR codes for any shortened link. Customize colors, add logos, and download in multiple formats.

apiPlatform.title: API Platform
apiPlatform.desc: Integrate link shortening into your workflow with our powerful REST API. Comprehensive documentation and SDKs.

teamCollab.title: Team Collaboration
teamCollab.desc: Work together with your team. Share link management, analytics, and billing in one workspace.

enterpriseSecurity.title: Enterprise Security
enterpriseSecurity.desc: Keep your links and data safe with enterprise-grade security features and compliance certifications.

linkManagement.title: Link Management
linkManagement.desc: Organize, search, and manage thousands of links from a powerful dashboard. Never lose track of a link again.

features.ctaDesc: Create your free account and start shortening links in seconds.

pricing.metaDescription: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Free, Pro, Business, and Enterprise plans with no hidden fees.
pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. No hidden fees. No surprises.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Free link shortening with analytics — no credit card needed.
features: Automatic QR codes for every link
Click analytics with geo & device data

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: Advanced analytics, branded domains, and 10x more capacity than competitors.
features: Detailed analytics dashboard: clicks over time, by referrer, geography, device, browser & OS

faq.q: Can I change my plan later?
faq.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately.
Yes, all paid plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

faq.q: What happens when I exceed my plan limits?
faq.a: We'll notify you and optionally auto-upgrade your plan or pause link creation.
Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll retain access until the end of your billing period.

faq.q: Can I use my own branded domain?
faq.a: Yes, Pro and Business plans allow you to use custom branded domains for your short links. This helps build brand recognition and trust.
Yes, we offer a full refund within 30 days of purchase if you're not satisfied. No questions asked.

pricing.ctaDesc: Pick your plan and start shortening links in seconds. No hidden fees. No surprises.

extension.metaDescription: The RELURL browser extension for Chrome and Firefox. Shorten URLs, generate QR codes, and copy short links with one click.
extension.title: Shorten Links at the Speed of a Click
extension.subtitle: The RELURL Browser Extension
extension.desc: Install the RELURL browser extension and shorten any URL without leaving the page you're on. One click — instant short link, copied and ready to share.
extension.feature1Desc: Click the RELURL icon in your browser toolbar and your current tab's URL is shortened instantly. No copying, no pasting, no extra steps.
extension.feature2Desc: Your new short link is automatically copied to your clipboard. Just click and paste — no extra clicks required.
extension.feature3Desc: Generate a QR code for any shortened link directly from the extension popup. Perfect for transferring links to your phone or sharing offline.
extension.feature4Desc: All links you create with the extension appear in your RELURL dashboard. Manage, edit, and track them alongside links created on the web.
extension.howItWorks1Desc: Add RELURL to Chrome or Firefox from the official store. It takes 10 seconds.
extension.howItWorks2Desc: Navigate to any page you want to shorten and click the RELURL icon in your browser toolbar.
extension.howItWorks3Desc: Your short link is copied automatically. Paste it anywhere — email, social media, messages.
extension.ctaDesc: Available for Chrome and Firefox. Free, fast, and privacy-friendly.
extension.why1: No more copy-paste-tab-switching. Shorten links without leaving your page.
extension.why2: Your links are always synced to your dashboard with full analytics.
extension.why3: One-click QR codes — perfect for quick mobile sharing.
extension.why4: Free forever. No account required to start (but sign in for analytics).
extension.faq1Q: Is the RELURL browser extension free?
extension.faq1A: Yes, the browser extension is completely free to install and use. You don't need an account to shorten links, but signing in gives you access to click analytics and link management.
extension.faq2A: The RELURL extension is available for Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and Opera. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience.
extension.faq3Q: Does the extension track my browsing?
extension.faq3A: No. The extension only activates when you click the toolbar icon. It never reads your browsing history, tracks your activity, or sends data without your action.

addDialog.title: Add Custom Domain

verifyInstructions.title: Verify Your Domain
verifyInstructions.description: Add the following TXT record to your DNS settings to prove domain ownership.
verifyInstructions.step1: Log in to your DNS provider (e.g. Cloudflare, Namecheap, GoDaddy).
verifyInstructions.step2: Navigate to the DNS settings for {domain}.
verifyInstructions.step3: Add a new TXT record with the value shown above.
verifyInstructions.step4: Wait a few minutes for DNS propagation, then click Verify.

detail.aiSuggestDesc: Let AI analyze your traffic and suggest smart redirect rules.
detail.title: Link Details
detail.retargetingDesc: Add tracking pixels to retarget your audience across platforms.
detail.customPixelsHint: One per line. Supports any tracking script.
detail.retargetingExplanation: Add tracking pixels to your short links to retarget visitors who click through. When someone clicks your link, the pixel fires and adds them to your ad platform's audience.
detail.step1Desc: Enter your pixel IDs from Facebook, Google, TikTok, LinkedIn, or Twitter.
detail.step2Desc: When visitors click your link, pixel events fire automatically.
detail.step3Desc: Create retargeting campaigns in your ad platforms to reach your link visitors.
detail.createAbTestDesc: Split your traffic between multiple destination URLs to find the best performer.
detail.aiOptimizationDesc: Analyze your link's click data to get smart recommendations for better performance.
detail.noClickDataDesc: Here are some suggestions to get started:
